case_title: BH FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC. VS. CENITINA LAWRENCE ET AL

docket_entries.description: SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF BH FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BH FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LAWRENCE, CENITINA DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-08-2017
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-30-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-03-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST JOHN P KENOSIAN, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JAN-30-2018, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-15-2018. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100032203)
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-30-2018 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
